x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: Topic fulfillment rate measures whether VA topics successfully complete their designed outcome. Low fulfillment degrades Now Assist self-service effectiveness.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Review topic fulfillment rates in VA analytics. Fix broken catalog integrations and workflow connections. Now Assist AI is only as effective as the topics it enhances. Target: 60%+ fulfillment rate.

sys_update_version.name: x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c52
sys_update_version.payload:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="x_snc_airop_check_definition"><x_snc_airop_check_definition action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"><ai_justification><![CDATA[Topic fulfillment rate measures whether VA topics successfully complete their designed outcome. Low fulfillment degrades Now Assist self-service effectiveness.]]></ai_justification><check_name>VA Topic Fulfillment Rate</check_name><check_script><![CDATA[(function(checkDef, dateFilter) {
    var cutoff = new GlideDateTime();
    cutoff.addDaysUTC(-90);

    var gaTotal = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaTotal.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaTotal.addQuery('state', 'IN', 'complete,agent_requested,abandoned');
    gaTotal.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaTotal.query();
    var total = gaTotal.next() ? parseInt(gaTotal.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    if (total === 0) {
        return {
            status: 'not_applicable',
            actualValue: 'No completed VA conversations in last 90 days',
            finding: 'No completed VA conversations found in the last 90 days. Topic fulfillment rate cannot be assessed.'
        };
    }

    var gaCompleted = new GlideAggregate('sys_cs_conversation');
    gaCompleted.addQuery('sys_created_on', '>=', cutoff.getValue());
    gaCompleted.addQuery('state', 'complete');
    gaCompleted.addAggregate('COUNT');
    gaCompleted.query();
    var completed = gaCompleted.next() ? parseInt(gaCompleted.getAggregate('COUNT')) : 0;

    var pct = Math.round((completed / total) * 100);
    var actualValue = pct + '% VA conversations fulfilled without agent transfer (last 90 days, ' + completed + '/' + total + ')';

    if (pct >= 60) {
        return {
            status: 'ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: pct + '% of VA conversations completed without agent transfer (last 90 days). Now Assist VA has a strong self-service foundation to enhance.'
        };
    } else if (pct >= 30) {
        return {
            status: 'needs_attention',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of VA conversations are fulfilled without agent transfer (last 90 days, target: 60%+). Now Assist AI self-service impact is limited when topic fulfillment is low.'
        };
    } else {
        return {
            status: 'not_ready',
            actualValue: actualValue,
            finding: 'Only ' + pct + '% of VA conversations are fulfilled (last 90 days). Very low fulfillment rate indicates broken topic flows or catalog integrations — fix these before enabling Now Assist VA.'
        };
    }
})]]></check_script><is_active>true</is_active><is_clone_sensitive>false</is_clone_sensitive><is_manual>false</is_manual><module>VIRTUAL_AGENT</module><number>CHK0000509</number><order>90</order><remediation_guidance>Review topic fulfillment rates in VA analytics. Fix broken catalog integrations and workflow connections. Now Assist AI is only as effective as the topics it enhances. Target: 60%+ fulfillment rate.</remediation_guidance><sys_class_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition</sys_class_name><sys_created_by>admin</sys_created_by><sys_created_on>2026-06-10 06:41:20</sys_created_on><sys_id>8ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c52</sys_id><sys_mod_count>1</sys_mod_count><sys_name>VA Topic Fulfillment Rate</sys_name><sys_package display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform" source="x_snc_airop">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_package><sys_policy/><sys_scope display_value="ServiceNow AI Readiness Optimization Platform">73e2562fcf244b908935fb251d851c78</sys_scope><sys_update_name>x_snc_airop_check_definition_8ff85dc7cfd587108935fb251d851c52</sys_update_name><sys_updated_by>admin</sys_updated_by><sys_updated_on>2026-06-10 06:54:02</sys_updated_on></x_snc_airop_check_definition></record_update>
